summary: Real-time availability feature testing complete. All requested features working correctly with backend API and frontend integration.

integration_issues.issue: Public URL (emergentagent.com) shows 'Preview Unavailable' page. Fixed by updating VITE_API_URL to localhost:8001 for testing.
integration_issues.priority: INFO - Infrastructure issue, not code issue

backend_check_availability_api.details: API returns correct availability data for all 25 locations with proper status (available/limited/fully_booked)

map_markers_green_indicators.details: Map markers show green indicators when availability API returns 'available'

map_markers_amber_indicators.details: Map markers show amber indicators when availability API returns 'limited' (e.g., for high guest counts)

header_shows_booking_params.details: Header shows 'Showing availability for X guests from DATE to DATE' when bookingParams is set

map_title_changes.details: Map title changes to 'Real-time Availability Map' when checking availability

availability_legend_in_sidebar.details: Availability legend appears in sidebar when bookingParams is present with green/amber/red indicators

location_details_availability_badge.details: Location details panel shows availability badge (Available/Limited/Fully Booked) with appropriate colors

location_details_your_selection.details: Location details panel shows 'Your Selection' with dates, guests, nights, and total estimate

safari_availability_badge.details: Safari availability badge appears at bottom right of map showing available slots

book_button_disabled_unavailable.details: Book This Stay button is disabled and shows 'Not Available' for unavailable locations

region_stats_available_total.details: Region filters show available/total format (e.g., '5/5', '0/5') when availability is checked

context_for_next_testing_agent: Real-time availability feature is fully implemented and working. Public URL issue is an infrastructure problem (Emergent preview unavailable) - for local testing, VITE_API_URL was updated to localhost:8001. All 11 availability features tested and passing: API endpoint, map markers with green/amber/red indicators, header with booking params, map title change, availability legend, location details with badges, Your Selection section with dates and estimate, safari availability badge, and disabled Book button for unavailable locations.
infrastructure_notes: Public URL (https://agent-env-6592602e-0b4e-4c50-88b4-6ab626d48e85.preview.emergentagent.com) shows 'Preview Unavailable' page. This is an Emergent platform issue, not a code issue. nginx was configured to proxy /api/* to backend:8001 and /* to frontend:3000 on localhost.
